name: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon
description:
Update!

Updated 24/3/26. (Previously: 642 perm tokens. Now: 1444 perm tokens (like that one russian video))

The Queen of the Full Moon has been left alone for too long and now craves for some companion to satisfy her needs.

Tell me if it doesn't get the lore right and I'll try to get a lorebook or something, or I can try making my own.

No image gallery because this character has some really bad porn out there, and very little. This is the best you can find, also these videos

she's 3m tall btw
